title: Neighborly
description: Meet a cast of animal crossing style neighbors! Features 250+ lines of dialog.
body:
![Neighborly logo](https://i.imgur.com/8nMIewD.png)

_Neighborly adds a diverse cast of friendly neighbors for you to find, talk to, and build homes for so they can join your town! The mod prioritizes strong character writing to offer a unique experience!_



Neighborly is, from what I can tell, the most character development and dialog focused mod ever made for Minecraft. In this cozy mod, you'll meet a wide cast of little animal characters. Check in with them regularly to improve your friendship, and gather resources to build each neighbor their dream house! This mod is perfect for any peaceful or casual modpack, as it adds a lot of new depth to the game without adding new combat.



# Features
12 unique neighbor characters with spawn egg crafting recipes
Over 250+ lines of dialog
12 unique house blueprints, one for each neighbor
Per-player reputation system with each neighbor
Neighbors give gifts once your reputation with them is good enough
Throw parties for your neighbors, complete with custom dialog for each party theme!
New: Neighbors know where their house is and will go home at night!



# Documentation

Learn more about the mod and each of the neighbors on [this google doc.](https://docs.google.com/document/d/15jeq0Z3oyaesoDP_FqgNanygzAf8jvWN8BVb-hVL4Bo/edit?usp=sharing).
